'''Gar Gastinin''' was a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] who was a known associate of [[Vilmarh Grahrk]]. He frequented the [[Cluster]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], where he drank with [[Vletho]], [[Keluda]], a [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]], and a [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]].
